description_long: This is a classic banker’s lamp featuring a polished, dark metallic base and a curved arm supporting a glossy green glass shade. The lamp has a pull-chain switch hanging from beneath the shade, which is a signature element of this style. The base is round and substantial, providing stability, and is adorned with subtle decorative ridges. The green glass shade is slightly curved and opaque, diffusing light softly while directing it downward. The metallic arm is elegantly curved, connecting the base to the shade with a smooth, continuous line. This lamp is typically found on desks in libraries, offices, or study areas, adding both illumination and a touch of vintage sophistication.
description: A classic banker’s lamp with a glossy green glass shade, polished dark metallic base, and a pull-chain switch. The design is elegant and vintage, ideal for desks or office settings.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the curved metallic arm, green glass shade, and the pull-chain switch hanging visibly.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the green glass shade and the central alignment of the pull-chain.
description_view_2: Opposite angled view emphasizing the arm’s curvature and the side profile of the green shade.
description_view_3: Direct rear view of the lamp, showing the back of the green shade and the symmetrical base.
